message:
feat(membrane): wire 13 new monitors into runtime kernel snapshot pipeline

- Add 10 new module declarations and public re-exports in mod.rs
- Expand META_SEVERITY_LEN from 21 to 31 for new monitor metadata
- Expand SIGNALS constant from 46 to 56 in both mod.rs and fusion.rs
- Add 20 new snapshot fields for monitor state serialization
- Wire all new monitors into the kernel's signal fusion pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
